text.title: typescript-react-2026 Worked Example
text.summary: Billing /dashboard route end-to-end with one Server Action.

section.title: Brief
section.p: /dashboard shows a list of invoices (Server Component, parallel fetch totals + recent invoices). Sidebar has a collapsible state (Client). createInvoice is a Server Action that takes a Zod-validated body and revalidates /dashboard.

section.title: Reading the spec
section.p: layout.tsx and page.tsx are server. Sidebar, InvoiceForm, error are client. actions.ts is the 'use server' module. createInvoice uses Zod on the input and revalidates /dashboard after success — the dashboard list refreshes automatically.
